summary.modeSystemAdoption: 77 components (78.6%) import and use mode object from @/design-system
summary.colorCompliance: 99% - Only 1 file (color-picker.tsx) contains hex colors (expected for color picker tool)
summary.fontCompliance: 100% - All components use mode.font or design tokens

components.name: Button
components.notes: Exemplary implementation - uses mode.radius, mode.font, mode.textTransform

components.name: Card (TerminalCard)
components.notes: Canonical card component - uses mode.radius, mode.font throughout all subcomponents

components.name: Input
components.notes: Uses mode.radius, mode.font, proper focus states with design tokens

components.notes: Uses mode.radius, mode.font, mode.textTransform

components.name: Tabs
components.notes: Uses !rounded-none override + mode.font

components.name: Dialog
components.notes: Uses mode.radius on content and close button

components.name: Alert
components.notes: Uses mode.radius, mode.font

components.name: Toast
components.notes: Uses mode.radius on actions and close button, mode.font on text

components.notes: Uses mode.radius, mode.font across trigger, content, items

components.name: Textarea
components.notes: Uses mode.radius, mode.font

components.name: Checkbox
components.notes: Uses mode.radius

components.name: Switch

components.name: RadioGroup

components.name: Popover

components.name: Tooltip
components.notes: Uses mode.radius, mode.font

components.name: Separator

components.name: Skeleton
components.notes: Uses mode.radius

components.name: Avatar
components.notes: Uses mode.radius on root and fallback

components.name: Accordion
components.notes: Uses mode.font on trigger and content

components.name: Calendar
components.notes: Uses mode.radius, mode.font throughout day cells and buttons

components.name: Command
components.notes: Uses mode.radius, mode.font on root, input, items

components.name: ColorPicker
components.notes: Contains hex colors (lines 25-41) for default color presets - ACCEPTABLE since this is a color picker tool that requires color values

recommendations: Mode system adoption is excellent at 78.6%
Continue using mode object for all new components
The single violation (color-picker.tsx hex colors) is acceptable and necessary for the component's function
nextSteps: Consider documenting the 21 components that don't import mode (likely because they don't need radius/font styling)
Ensure all future components follow the established pattern
Monitor for any new hardcoded colors during development
